prose.overview: Pattavia Century Golf Club is an 18-hole, par-72 course in Klongkiew, Ban Bueng, Chonburi, originally opened in 1996 as Chonburi Century Country Club and substantially upgraded in 2014 following acquisition by the owners of Chang Breweries. The 2014 renovation extended the layout to over 7,100 yards from the championship tees and included a new clubhouse. Green fees are structured with a base rate of 1,050 THB (weekday, caddie included) rising to 2,050 THB for the peak weekend morning all-in package (caddie and cart). At 50 minutes from central Pattaya via Highway 331 and 90 minutes from Suvarnabhumi Airport, the course sits off the main tourist golf corridor and offers a lower-cost alternative to the premium courses closer to the city.
prose.layout_and_experience: The 2014 upgrade substantially reworked the original Chonburi Century layout — the new design plays to over 7,100 yards from the tips, making it one of the longer 18-hole tracks in the Pattaya inland area. The course routes through pineapple fields and Chonburi farmland, a setting that gives it a distinctly local, non-resort character compared to the manicured beach-adjacent or hilltop courses elsewhere in the region. The upgrade included improved irrigation, new tee complexes, and the extended yardage, but retained the flat-to-gently-rolling terrain characteristic of the inland Ban Bueng area. The affordable pricing reflects the off-corridor location and the absence of resort facilities.
prose.tips: Pattavia Century Golf Club is best suited to golfers staying in Pattaya who want a longer, off-the-beaten-track round at a fraction of the cost of the premium Pattaya courses. The 50-minute drive from central Pattaya via Highway 331 is straightforward by car or golf transfer. Cart is optional on most tee times — walking with caddie is the cheaper option on weekday rounds. Peak weekend morning slots require a cart and run 2,050 THB all-in; booking the afternoon window (after noon on weekends) gives the standard 1,450 THB rate with optional cart. Note that this course was formerly listed as Chonburi Century Country Club in older directories — confirm the name with your agent when booking.
prose.location_and_access: Pattavia Century Golf Club is located at 99/1 Moo 5, Klongkiew, Ban Bueng, Chonburi 20220 — approximately 135km southeast of Bangkok and 50 minutes from central Pattaya via Highway 331 toward Rayong. The drive from Bangkok takes around 90 minutes. Pre-arranged golf transfers from Pattaya are the standard transport option; self-drive is also practical.
prose.rental_cta_context: Playing Pattavia Century Golf Club? Rent clubs from LENGOLF and save the check-in hassle — 7,100 yards of Chonburi farmland is worth being properly equipped for.
